title: WebUIActionResult
description: Schema for the result of a WebUI control-plane action. Captures the outcome, effects produced (for preview) or applied (for execute), and any validation errors or blockers. See docs/ai-native/webui-action-contract.md for policy and field-level documentation.

requestId.description: Matches the requestId from the originating WebUIActionRequest.

mode.description: Mode that was actually run. Must match the request mode.

actionType.description: The action type that was evaluated.

outcome.description: success = action completed. blocked = policy or gate prevented execution. error = unexpected failure. skipped = no-op (e.g. target already in desired state).

effects.description: Effects produced (preview) or applied (execute). Empty when outcome is blocked or error.

blockers.description: Policy or gate blockers that prevented execution. Only populated when outcome is blocked.

errors.description: Unexpected errors encountered. Only populated when outcome is error.

capturedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the result was captured.

durationMs.description: Wall-clock time for the action to complete. Null for preview mode.

before.description: State before the action. May be any JSON type. Omitted for preview mode.

after.description: State after the action. May be any JSON type. Omitted for preview mode.

code.description: Machine-readable blocker code (e.g. POLICY_DENY, GATE_BLOCKED, ALLOWLIST_MISS).

message.description: Human-readable error description. Must not contain secrets or tokens.
